requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — IEC 62196 Type 2 / IEC 61851 vs GB/T
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——IEC 62196 Type 2 / IEC 61851与GB/T
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——IEC 62196 Type 2 / IEC 61851與GB/T

summary.en: Dominica's UK / IEC electrical legacy includes BS 1363 Type G domestic sockets, while EV charging projects should follow IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC charging and IEC 61851 EVSE safety and control requirements. DC fast charging should remain within the IEC 62196 / IEC 61851 ecosystem where specified, rather than the North American SAE J1772 / CCS1 direction. Type 2 and IEC 61851 evidence become practical requirements where specified by DBOS, DOMLEC, a public tender, hotel operator, fleet owner, or charge-point operator. A pilot network should align with IEC charging architecture from the start to avoid vehicle and spare-part fragmentation.
summary.zh: 多米尼克的英国/IEC电气传统包括BS 1363 Type G家用插座，而电动汽车充电项目应采用交流IEC 62196 Type 2，并符合IEC 61851 EVSE安全和控制要求。直流快充在项目指定时也应保持在IEC 62196 / IEC 61851生态内，而不是北美SAE J1772 / CCS1方向。当DBOS、DOMLEC、公共招标、酒店运营商、车队业主或充电点运营商提出要求时，Type 2和IEC 61851证据即成为实务要求。试点网络应从一开始即采用IEC充电架构，以避免车辆和备件碎片化。
summary.zht: 多米尼克的英國/IEC電氣傳統包括BS 1363 Type G家用插座，而電動汽車充電項目應採用交流IEC 62196 Type 2，並符合IEC 61851 EVSE安全和控制要求。直流快充在項目指定時也應保持在IEC 62196 / IEC 61851生態內，而不是北美SAE J1772 / CCS1方向。當DBOS、DOMLEC、公共招標、酒店運營商、車隊業主或充電點運營商提出要求時，Type 2和IEC 61851證據即成為實務要求。試點網絡應從一開始即採用IEC充電架構，以避免車輛和備件碎片化。

standards_or_laws: BS 1363 — Type G domestic plug and socket ecosystem
IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers within the IEC connector ecosystem

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 communication. GB/T AC couplers differ from IEC Type 2 in connector gender and signaling, and GB/T DC couplers are physically and protocol-incompatible with CCS2. China-side GB/T connector evidence is not accepted as an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute for Dominica projects.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中国直流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并使用GB/T 27930通信。GB/T交流接口与IEC Type 2在接口性别和信号上不同，GB/T直流接口与CCS2在物理和协议上不兼容。中国侧GB/T接口证据不能作为多米尼克项目IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2的替代。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中國直流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並使用GB/T 27930通訊。GB/T交流接口與IEC Type 2在接口性別和信號上不同，GB/T直流接口與CCS2在物理和協議上不兼容。中國側GB/T接口證據不能作為多米尼克項目IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2的替代。

gap.en: A GB/T-only charger requires hardware redesign before Dominica deployment: coupler, cable assembly, locking, proximity and control-pilot circuits, DC communication stack where applicable, labels, temperature-rise evidence, and spare parts must be converted to IEC 62196 Type 2 / IEC 61851 architecture. Adapters should not be treated as a project-compliant solution. Confirm connector requirements before quoting because a small island market can be locked into the wrong ecosystem quickly.
gap.zh: 仅支持GB/T的充电桩在多米尼克部署前需要硬件重新设计：耦合器、电缆组件、锁止、接近导引和控制导引电路、适用时的直流通信栈、标签、温升证据及备件均须转换为IEC 62196 Type 2 / IEC 61851架构。不应将转接器视为项目合规方案。报价前须确认接口要求，因为小岛市场很容易被错误生态锁定。
gap.zht: 僅支持GB/T的充電樁在多米尼克部署前需要硬體重新設計：耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止、接近導引和控制導引電路、適用時的直流通訊棧、標籤、溫升證據及備件均須轉換為IEC 62196 Type 2 / IEC 61851架構。不應將轉接器視為項目合規方案。報價前須確認接口要求，因為小島市場很容易被錯誤生態鎖定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where specified by DBOS, DOMLEC, tender, vehicle fleet, hotel owner, or charge-point operator; GB/T is physically incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 / IEC 61851 charging architecture
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Dominica projects should be specified around IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC charging and IEC 61851 EVSE requirements, with DC fast charging kept in the IEC connector ecosystem where required. GB/T connectors are not compatible with that ecosystem, so conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign rather than a label change.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 多米尼克项目宜按交流IEC 62196 Type 2和IEC 61851 EVSE要求进行规格定义，并在需要直流快充时保持在IEC接口生态内。GB/T接口与该生态不兼容，因此转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非标签变更。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 多米尼克項目宜按交流IEC 62196 Type 2和IEC 61851 EVSE要求進行規格定義，並在需要直流快充時保持在IEC接口生態內。GB/T接口與該生態不兼容，因此轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非標籤變更。
